/usr/bin/g++  -Wall -Wno-unused-function -Wno-unused-parameter -Wextra -std=c++11 -Wno-dollar-in-identifier-extension -O3 -DNDEBUG -L/opt/ohpc/pub/apps/python/3.11.4/lib -rdynamic CMakeFiles/BasicPerformance_Solution.dir/hw3/performance/BasicPerformance_Solution_generated_basic_solution.cu.o -o BasicPerformance_Solution  /opt/ohpc/pub/apps/cuda/11.8/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl -lrt libwb.a -lpthread -lm -lrt /opt/ohpc/pub/apps/cuda/11.8/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt
